title: Shopify Admin Customer
description: Schema for a Shopify customer resource in the Admin API

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the customer

email.description: The unique email address of the customer

verified_email.description: Whether the customer has verified their email address

accepts_marketing.description: Whether the customer has consented to receive marketing material via email

created_at.description: The date and time when the customer was created

updated_at.description: The date and time when the customer information was last updated

orders_count.description: The number of orders associated with the customer

total_spent.description: The total amount of money that the customer has spent across their order history

tags.description: Tags that the shop owner has attached to the customer

currency.description: The three-letter code for the currency that the customer used when they paid for their last order

tax_exempt.description: Whether the customer is exempt from paying taxes on their order

addresses.description: A list of the customer's addresses
